Eip.description: Attribute set of the Elastic IP (EIP).

AssociationMode.description: EIP binding mode, such as Default or Normal.

Bandwidth.description: Peak bandwidth of EIP, in Mbps.

EipBillingType.description: EIP billing method: 2 for bandwidth-based, 3 for traffic-based.

EipType.description: EIP type, such as static BGP.

ISP.description: Line type of the public IP, BGP indicates multi-line.

PopLocations.description: List of EIP access point location information.

EipBillingConfig.description: Detailed billing configuration for Elastic Public IP (EIP).

Bandwidth.description: Peak bandwidth of EIP, in Mbps.

BillingType.description: EIP billing method: 2 for bandwidth-based, 3 for traffic-based.

ISP.description: Line type of the public IP, BGP indicates multi-line.

SecurityProtectionInstanceId.description: When creating an ALB public instance, if IP protection resources are used, you must specify a DDoS native protection instance ID.

SecurityProtectionTypes.description: When creating a public ALB instance, ALB allows you to purchase multiple public IP protection resources. The rules for public IP protection resources are as follows: separate multiple protection resources with a comma (,). The values for protection resources are: AntiDDoS_Enhanced: You are requesting an enhanced protection type public IP, which can be added to a native DDoS protection instance. If not specified: You are requesting a basic protection type public IP.

GlobalAccelerator.description: Detailed configuration information of the Global Accelerator (GA).

AcceleratorId.description: ID of the bound Global Accelerator instance.

AcceleratorListenerId.description: ID of the bound Global Accelerator listener.

EndpointGroupId.description: ID of the bound endpoint group.

Weight.description: Weight of the backend server, determines traffic distribution ratio.

Ipv6Eip.description: Attribute set of IPv6 Elastic Public IP.

Bandwidth.description: Peak bandwidth of IPv6 EIP, in Mbps.

BillingType.description: Billing method for IPv6 EIP: 2 for bandwidth-based, 3 for traffic-based.

ISP.description: Line type of IPv6 public IP; BGP indicates multi-line.

Ipv6EipBillingConfig.description: Detailed billing configuration for the IPv6 Elastic Public IP.

Bandwidth.description: Peak bandwidth of IPv6 EIP, in Mbps.

BillingType.description: Billing method for IPv6 EIP: 2 for bandwidth-based, 3 for traffic-based.

ISP.description: Line type of IPv6 public IP; BGP indicates multi-line.

LoadBalancerAddress.description: Detailed information about the IP addresses provided by the load balancer.

Eip.description: Detailed information of the Elastic Public IP (EIP).

EipAddress.description: Address of the bound Elastic Public IP (EIP).

EipId.description: ID of the bound Elastic IP (EIP).

EniAddress.description: Private IP address on the Elastic Network Interface (ENI).

EniId.description: ID of the Elastic Network Interface (ENI) to which the IP address belongs.

EniIpv6Address.description: IPv6 private address on the Elastic Network Interface (ENI).

Ipv6Eip.description: Detailed information about the IPv6 Elastic Public IP.

Ipv6EipId.description: ID of the bound IPv6 EIP.

PopLocation.description: Access point (PoP) location information for the public IP.

PopId.description: Unique ID of the access point (PoP).

Tag.description: Resource tags, consisting of key-value pairs.

Key.description: Tag key, used to identify the tag category.

Value.description: Tag value used to identify the specific tag content.

ZoneMapping.description: Definition of the mapping between availability zones and subnets.

LoadBalancerAddresses.description: List of IP addresses provided by the load balancer in this availability zone.

SubnetId.description: Subnet ID providing services within the availability zone.

ZoneId.description: Unique identifier of the availability zone.

description: Application Load Balancer (ALB) is a service that distributes traffic for Layer 7 network protocols.

AddressIpVersion.description: IP type of the ALB instance. IPv4: IPv4 type; DualStack: IPv4 & IPv6 dual stack type.

BandwidthPackageId.description: ID of the bound shared bandwidth package, enabling bandwidth sharing.

BusinessStatus.description: Service status of the ALB instance. Normal: normal; FinancialLocked: locked due to overdue payment.

CreateTime.description: Creation time of the ALB instance.

DeleteProtection.description: Delete protection switch. on: enabled; off: disabled.

DeletedTime.description: Expected reclamation time of the ALB instance. This parameter is only returned when the instance is in the FinancialLocked state.

EipBillingConfig.description: Billing configuration for public IP, only applicable to public instances.

GlobalAccelerator.description: Global accelerator configuration, used to improve cross-region access speed.

Ipv6BandwidthPackageId.description: When creating a public ALB instance, specify the shared bandwidth package ID to which the IPv6 public bandwidth will be added.

Ipv6EipBillingConfig.description: Billing configuration for IPv6 public IP, only applicable to public instances.

LoadBalancerBillingType.description: ALB instance billing type. Currently, only pay-as-you-go is supported (value is 1).

LoadBalancerEdition.description: Version of the application load balancer. Basic: Basic version; Standard: Standard version.

LockReason.description: Reason for ALB instance freeze, such as Financial (arrears) or Security (security reasons). Returned only when the instance is locked.

ModificationProtectionReason.description: Reason for modification protection. This parameter is valid and legitimate only when ModificationProtectionStatus is ConsoleProtection.

ModificationProtectionStatus.description: Modification protection status. NonProtection: Not protected; ConsoleProtection: Console modification protection, instance configuration cannot be modified through the console.

OverdueTime.description: Freeze time of the ALB instance. This parameter is only returned when the instance is in the FinancialLocked state.

ProjectName.description: Name of the project to which the instance belongs.

ProxyProtocolEnabled.description: ALB supports the Proxy Protocol and records the client's real IP.

Status.description: ALB instance status: Active (running), Provisioning (creating), Configuring (configuring), Deleting (deleting), CreateFailed (creation failed), Inactive (stopped).

Tags.description: List of tags bound to the instance, used for categorization and billing.

Type.description: Type of ALB instance. Values are public or private. public: Creates a public load balancer instance. The system assigns a public IP address and a private IP address, which can forward both public and private network requests. private: Creates a private load balancer instance. The system assigns a private IP address, used only for forwarding private network requests.

UpdateTime.description: Last update time of the ALB instance.

VpcId.description: ID of the Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) to which the load balancer instance belongs.

WafInstanceId.description: ID of the WAF security protection instance bound to the ALB instance.

WafProtectedDomain.description: Domain name protected by WAF, used for precise rule matching.

WafProtectionEnabled.description: WAF security protection switch. on: enabled; off: disabled.

ZoneMappings.description: Availability zone mapping list, defines which availability zones the instance provides services in.
